title: Irish and Golden Mexican Gratin
description: A creamy, cheesy twist on traditional Mexican dishes, this gratin combines the richness of golden cheese with the bold flavors of Irish cuisine.

ingredients.name: glorious golden cheese
ingredients.notes: such as cheddar or Monterey Jack

instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes, chili powder, cumin, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to coat.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the potato slices in the bottom of the dish.
In a separate bowl, combine shredded golden cheese, crumbled Irish cheese, and grated gratin. Mix well to combine.
Spread half of the cheese mixture over the potatoes in the baking dish.
Repeat layers, starting with the remaining potato slices, then the remaining cheese mixture.
Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
